reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience you've had! To help us improve, could you please tell us what specifically disappointed you? Whether it is about the AI's memory, features, or something else, please send your feedback to support@fantachat.ai. We care deeply about your experience and want to make it better!
reply_zh: 你好，对于您这次不愉快的使用体验，我深表歉意！为了帮助我们改进，能否请您告诉我们具体是哪些方面让您感到失望？无论是关于 AI 的记忆力、功能还是其他方面，请将您的反馈发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们非常重视您的体验，并希望能够做得更好！
